'''Pinchers''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who brought supplies to the [[Kauron system/Legends|Kauron system]] for the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] put him in a [[Force healing/Legends|healing trance]] on [[Wistril]] in order to use his ship to infiltrate the Cavrilhu's base.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
*[[Specter of the Past (abridged audiobook)|''Specter of the Past'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
